summary: Full regression on the new React+Vite+Tailwind JppHub frontend. Backend Node/Express (through Python FastAPI proxy) is healthy: 20/20 pytest green (17 previous + 3 new for /api/contact y PATCH /api/articles/:id/views). Frontend Playwright flow covered: login admin+autor, dashboard stats+Quill modal, admin panel (Queue/Articles/Users tabs, 4 stats, role-select rows), logout, protected-route redirect (unauth /dashboard → /login), public /articulos search+sort+9 cards+4 category filters, article detail (title, content, share), landing (hero CTA, 6 feature cards, 6 articles grid, 4 FAQs, contact form que envia OK), registro form completo, 404 page, theme toggle light/dark persistente en localStorage (key jpphub_theme), RBAC admin (autor logueado → /admin redirige a /dashboard). Todos los data-testids críticos presentes con nombres reales del código (dashboard-new-article-btn, article-save-btn, admin-tab-{queue,articles,users}, role-select-{id}, article-card-{slug}, articles-sort, category-filter-{cat}, hero-cta-register, contact-form, nav-logout-btn, theme-toggle-btn, notfound-home-btn, register-*-input/submit, login-*-input/submit).
critical_code_review_comments: review_request menciona testids que no coinciden exactamente con los del codigo (ej. 'new-article-btn' vs 'dashboard-new-article-btn', 'hero-section' inexistente). Los elementos interactivos SI tienen testid — es solo inconsistencia de nombres entre spec y codigo. Considerar alinear nombres al spec o actualizar la doc.

Landing.jsx no tiene testid a nivel de seccion (hero-section, stats-section, testimonials-section, pricing-section, faq-section, contact-section). Los items interno SI los tienen (feature-card-i, faq-i, landing-article-slug, contact-form). Recomendable anadir los de seccion para auditorias QA.

/app/frontend/.env tiene REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL vacio. En preview funciona porque api.js cae a window.location.origin, pero si algun dia se hace build preview + deploy diferente rompera. Documentar o rellenar con la URL publica.

api.js convierte siempre con (import.meta.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL || VITE_BACKEND_URL); ambos estan vacios. Aceptable por fallback a origin, pero en logs 401 automaticos limpian token+user lo cual puede causar UX incomodo si el navegador entra en otra tab y token expira mientras se esta escribiendo un articulo (perdida del modal). Considerar buffer/retry.
ArticleController.getArticleBySlug filtra status !== 'approved' en el controller en lugar del repository (nota heredada, aun aplica).

validators/articleValidators.js usa Joi.string().min(20) sobre el HTML de Quill; un parrafo trivial

hola

(12 chars) se rechazaria. Contar texto plano seria mas natural.
test_credentials: admin@jpphub.com / Admin123! ; autor@jpphub.com / Autor123! (validos, definidos en /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Se crearon 12 articulos TEST_Pag_* desde iteracion 2 (aun presentes, idempotente con uuid). Un mensaje de contacto TEST_Browser se genero durante Playwright pero la BD lo persistira (no requiere cleanup inmediato).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stack: React+Vite+TailwindCSS (frontend) sobre Node/Express+MariaDB via FastAPI wrapper. Backend base URL se lee de REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (env) o fallback a window.location.origin. Archivos testids reales: Login (login-email-input/login-password-input/login-submit-btn/login-register-link), Register (register-name-input/register-email-input/register-password-input/register-submit-btn), Navbar (nav-logo/nav-link-*/theme-toggle-btn/nav-dashboard-btn/nav-admin-btn/nav-logout-btn/nav-login-btn/nav-register-btn), Dashboard (dashboard-new-article-btn/stat-card-*/filter-*/article-title-input/article-description-input/article-category-select/article-content-editor/article-save-btn), Admin (admin-refresh-btn/admin-stat-*/admin-tab-{queue|articles|users}/admin-search-input/queue-item-{id}/approve-btn-{id}/review-btn-{id}/reject-btn-{id}/admin-articles-table/admin-users-table/role-select-{id}/review-action-*/review-note-input/review-submit-btn), Landing (hero-cta-register/hero-cta-demo/stat-i/feature-card-i/landing-article-{slug}/faq-i/contact-form), Articles (articles-search-input/articles-sort/category-filter-{c}/article-card-{slug}), ArticleDetail (article-title/article-content/article-share-btn/article-back-link). Token localStorage key: jpphub_token; Theme key: jpphub_theme. Protected routes /dashboard /admin funcionan. 404: notfound-home-btn.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues en esta iteracion. Stack nuevo React SaaS-grade funciona end-to-end con APIs Node intactas.
